case_title: ROSEMARY BOCCIO BAKER VS. DESIGN MILAGROS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF ROSEMARY BOCCIO BAKER IS PRESENT.
